prompt: Classify a snippet that calls $list_utils:slice(values, 2, 4) on a LambdaCore-style core.
expected_properties: labels it portable or core-utility dependent rather than ToastStunt builtin code
mentions the target core must provide $list_utils
does not claim all slicing requires ToastStunt

prompt: Explain why $object_utils:isa(object, parent) should not be labeled ToastStunt-specific solely because ToastStunt also has isa().
expected_properties: distinguishes core utility verb from server builtin
labels by the implementation actually called
does not conflate $object_utils:isa with isa builtin
